reference: Hi, stomach pain is different from back pain. A change of mattress may give rise to back pain, but it is unlikely to cause stomach pain. Try taking pain relievers for a few days, and if there is no improvement, then go for an ultrasound of the whole abdomen.
text: Stomach pain is different from back pain; a change of mattress may give rise to back pain, but it is unlikely to cause stomach pain. Try taking pain relievers for a few days, and if there is no improvement, then go for an ultrasound of the whole abdomen.
